hero.name: Pratik Ravasaheb Thete
hero.introduction: I build intelligent systems and elegant interfaces from neural networks to production-ready web apps. Passionate about turning data into decisions and ideas into impactful software.

about.bio: I'm a third-year B.Tech student specializing in AI & Data Science at VIT, driven by a passion for building systems that are not just functional, but intelligent. I thrive at the intersection of machine learning, full-stack development, and real-world problem solving.
about.objective: To leverage my expertise in AI/ML and full-stack development to contribute to innovative, data-driven solutions at a forward-thinking organization, while continuously growing as an engineer and researcher.

projects.title: AI Student Mentor System
projects.description: An AI-powered student mentoring platform that provides personalized academic guidance, study planning, career recommendations, and an intelligent chatbot for real-time student support.
projects.overview: AI Student Mentor System is a full-stack web application that leverages Artificial Intelligence to provide personalized learning assistance, career guidance, study roadmaps, performance analytics, and an interactive AI chatbot. The platform helps students improve their academic performance through data-driven insights and intelligent recommendations.
projects.problem: Students often struggle to find personalized academic guidance, organize study plans, and identify skill gaps. This application addresses these challenges by offering AI-driven mentoring, progress tracking, career recommendations, and instant academic support through an intelligent chatbot.
features: Admin dashboard for user and analytics management
challenges: Developing an intelligent chatbot capable of understanding academic queries
Integrating multiple AI models with the backend using FastAPI
Designing scalable REST APIs for real-time communication
Building an intuitive dashboard with performance visualizations
learnings: Developed and integrated AI services using Python FastAPI
Built scalable REST APIs with Node.js and Express.js
Implemented secure authentication using JWT and MongoDB
Applied NLP and Machine Learning techniques for personalized recommendations
Designed a responsive full-stack application with React.js and modern UI principles

projects.title: Real-Time Collaborative Code Editor
projects.description: A full-stack real-time collaborative code editor that enables multiple users to write, edit, and execute code simultaneously with live synchronization, integrated chat, and AI-powered code assistance.
projects.overview: Real-Time Collaborative Code Editor is a full-stack web application that allows multiple developers to collaborate on the same codebase in real time. The platform provides synchronized code editing, secure room-based collaboration, live chat, AI-powered code generation, and instant code execution to enhance team productivity and remote programming.
projects.problem: Traditional code sharing methods are inefficient for pair programming and team collaboration because they lack real-time synchronization and integrated communication. This project solves these challenges by enabling multiple users to edit code simultaneously, communicate through live chat, and receive AI-assisted coding suggestions within a shared workspace.
features: Real-time collaborative code editing using Socket.io
Secure room creation and joining with unique meeting IDs
Live code synchronization across multiple users
Integrated real-time chat for team communication
Monaco Editor with syntax highlighting and auto-completion
AI-powered code generation and debugging assistance
Run HTML, CSS, and JavaScript code with live preview
challenges: Implementing low-latency real-time synchronization between multiple users
Handling concurrent edits without data conflicts
Integrating AI code generation into the collaborative workflow
Managing scalable Socket.io connections and secure room sessions
learnings: Developed real-time communication using Socket.io and WebSockets
Integrated Monaco Editor for a professional coding experience
Built scalable REST APIs using Node.js and Express.js
Implemented secure authentication and session management using JWT
Designed a collaborative system architecture with MongoDB and real-time event handling
Integrated AI APIs to provide intelligent code generation and programming assistance

projects.title: Online Book Store Review & Recommendation System
projects.description: A full-stack online bookstore platform that enables users to browse books, write reviews, rate books, and receive personalized book recommendations using machine learning algorithms.
projects.overview: The Online Book Store Review & Recommendation System is a full-stack web application that allows users to explore books, read and write reviews, rate books, manage their shopping cart, and receive personalized book recommendations based on their interests and reading history. The recommendation engine uses machine learning techniques to improve the user experience and help readers discover relevant books.
projects.problem: Online bookstores often overwhelm users with thousands of books, making it difficult to find titles that match individual interests. This project addresses that challenge by combining user ratings, reviews, and recommendation algorithms to suggest books tailored to each user's preferences.
features: User registration and secure JWT authentication
Browse books by category, author, and genre
Admin dashboard for managing books, categories, and users
RESTful API integration for seamless communication
challenges: Designing an accurate recommendation engine using user preferences
Managing large datasets of books and reviews efficiently
Building scalable APIs for search and recommendation features
Implementing secure authentication and role-based access control
learnings: Implemented recommendation algorithms using Scikit-learn
Developed scalable REST APIs with Node.js and Express.js
Designed MongoDB schemas for books, reviews, and user data
Built secure authentication using JWT
Enhanced frontend performance with React.js and dynamic state management
Applied machine learning techniques to improve recommendation accuracy

projects.title: Student Performance Prediction System
projects.description: An AI-powered student performance prediction system that analyzes academic data, predicts student performance, generates personalized learning roadmaps, and provides intelligent academic assistance through an integrated chatbot.
projects.overview: The Student Performance Prediction System is an AI-driven academic platform that predicts student performance using machine learning models based on attendance, marks, study habits, and academic records. The application features a personalized dashboard with performance analytics, timetable management, an AI chatbot for academic support, customized learning roadmaps, and profile management to help students improve their learning outcomes.
projects.problem: Many students struggle to monitor their academic progress and identify areas that need improvement. This system addresses the problem by using predictive analytics to estimate academic performance, provide personalized study recommendations, and assist students with AI-powered guidance.
features: Home dashboard with academic overview and quick insights
Interactive performance analytics with charts and reports
AI chatbot for academic queries and study guidance
Personalized learning roadmap based on performance
challenges: Building an accurate machine learning model for performance prediction
Integrating AI prediction services with the web application
Designing personalized learning roadmaps based on prediction results
Developing an intelligent chatbot for real-time academic assistance
learnings: Developed machine learning models using Scikit-learn for academic performance prediction
Integrated Python FastAPI with Node.js for AI-based prediction services
Built secure REST APIs using Express.js and MongoDB
Created interactive dashboards and performance visualizations using Chart.js
Implemented personalized learning recommendations and timetable management
Designed a scalable full-stack application with AI-driven academic support features

projects.title: Meghdoot - Android Weather Application
projects.description: A native Android weather application built with Java and XML that provides real-time weather updates, 7-day forecasts, location-based weather information, and an intuitive Material Design interface using the OpenWeatherMap API.
projects.overview: Meghdoot is a native Android weather application designed to deliver accurate real-time weather information with a clean and modern user interface. The application uses the OpenWeatherMap API to display current weather conditions, hourly forecasts, 7-day weather predictions, air quality information, and weather alerts while supporting automatic location detection and city-based searches.
projects.problem: Users often need quick and reliable weather information for daily planning, but many applications are cluttered with unnecessary features. Meghdoot solves this by providing a lightweight, responsive, and user-friendly weather application with accurate forecasts and location-based weather updates.
features: Real-time weather updates using OpenWeatherMap API
Current temperature, humidity, pressure, and wind speed
Offline storage of recent searched cities using SQLite
challenges: Integrating GPS location services with weather APIs
Handling asynchronous API requests using Retrofit
Managing runtime permissions for location access
Designing a responsive Android UI for multiple screen sizes
learnings: Developed native Android applications using Java and XML
Integrated REST APIs using Retrofit for real-time data
Implemented location services and runtime permission handling
Managed local data storage using SQLite
Designed responsive Material Design user interfaces
Optimized API calls and improved application performance

projects.title: AI College Recommendation System
projects.description: An AI-powered college recommendation platform that helps students find the most suitable colleges based on academic performance, entrance exam scores, preferences, and machine learning predictions.
projects.overview: The AI College Recommendation System is a full-stack web application that assists students in selecting the most suitable colleges based on their academic qualifications, entrance exam scores, category, location preferences, and career goals. Using machine learning algorithms, the system analyzes student profiles and recommends the best colleges with detailed information, comparison tools, and admission insights.
projects.problem: Students often find it challenging to identify the right colleges due to the vast number of available institutions, varying admission criteria, and changing cutoffs. This system simplifies the decision-making process by providing personalized college recommendations based on student profiles and historical admission data.
features: Student registration and secure JWT authentication
AI-based college recommendation using machine learning
Support for both 12th and Diploma students
Top college recommendations with prediction scores
Detailed college profiles including fees, rankings, placements, and infrastructure
Admin dashboard for managing colleges and datasets
challenges: Preparing and preprocessing large college admission datasets
Building an accurate recommendation model using machine learning
Managing dynamic filtering based on multiple admission criteria
Designing scalable APIs for recommendation and comparison features
learnings: Developed recommendation models using Scikit-learn and Pandas
Built scalable REST APIs using Node.js, Express.js, and Flask
Designed MongoDB schemas for students, colleges, and recommendation history
Implemented secure authentication using JWT
Applied data preprocessing and feature engineering for prediction accuracy
Created an intuitive React.js interface with advanced filtering and comparison features

experience.description: Developed and deployed NLP pipelines for sentiment analysis and entity extraction on customer feedback data. Improved model accuracy by 18% through feature engineering and hyperparameter tuning.
Assisted in research on federated learning for privacy-preserving medical AI. Implemented baseline CNN models and contributed to a paper submitted at ICML 2024.
Built and deployed 5+ web applications for clients across e-commerce, healthcare, and education sectors. Managed end-to-end development from UI design to cloud deployment.

research.title: Online Bookstore With Review Enhanced Hybrid Recommendation System
research.conference: International Conference on Emerging Trends in Computers & Communication 2025

research.title: Enhancing Collaborative Code Editors with Semantic Awareness
research.conference: International Conference on Computing Theory and Wireless Communication 2026
research.abstract: Because they allow for simultaneous code editing, real-time synchronization, and shared awareness among developers, real-time collaborative code editors are frequently used to facilitate dispersed software development. The standard collaborative code editors provide many of the basic functionalities required for multi-user editing (syntax highlighting, role-independent collaboration, etc.) and many do not provide any context regarding developers' intentions, semantic meaning of code or types of edits being made

testimonials.name: Dr. Anjali Sharma
testimonials.review: Pratik is one of the most inquisitive students I've mentored. His ability to bridge theory and implementation, especially in ML research, is exceptional. He consistently delivers work that exceeds expectations.

testimonials.name: Rohan Kapoor
testimonials.review: During his internship, Pratik independently designed and shipped a production NLP pipeline that reduced our manual labeling effort by 40%. His initiative and code quality are hire-worthy.

testimonials.name: Sneha Patil
testimonials.review: We hired Pratik as a freelance developer and he delivered a full-stack platform in 3 weeks that we thought would take 2 months. His communication, reliability, and technical depth are rare.
